items.title: 跟讀會議開場句
items.teacher: Please say: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.
items.prompt: Please say: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.
expect: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.
Good morning everyone, let's begin today's meeting.
items.model_answer: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.
items.sample: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.
items.correct_reply: 很好，你已經完成正式的會議開場。
items.retry_reply: 請再說一次，句子裡要有 good morning、everyone 和 meeting。

ja.prompt: 「Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.」と言ってください。
ja.hint: 英文をそのまま一度言ってください。
ja.sample: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.

zh.prompt: 請跟我說：大家早安，我們開始今天的會議。
zh.hint: 照著英文完整說一次即可。
zh.sample: Good morning everyone. Let's begin today's meeting.

items.title: 理解會議用語
items.teacher: What does “Let's begin today's meeting” mean?
items.prompt: What does “Let's begin today's meeting” mean?
items.hint: 請用中文或短英文回答，意思是「我們開始今天的會議」。
expect: 讓我們開始今天的會議
items.model_answer: It means: 我們開始今天的會議。
items.sample: It means: 我們開始今天的會議。
items.correct_reply: 答對了，這是正式開始會議時常用的句子。
items.retry_reply: 想想 begin 和 meeting 的意思，再回答一次。

ja.prompt: 「Let's begin today's meeting」はどういう意味ですか？
ja.hint: 「今日の会議を始めましょう」という意味です。
ja.sample: It means: 今日の会議を始めましょう。

zh.prompt: Let's begin today's meeting 是什麼意思？
zh.hint: 意思是「我們開始今天的會議」。

items.title: 套用到會議情境
items.teacher: You want to suggest a new advertising campaign. What can you say?
items.prompt: You want to suggest a new advertising campaign. What can you say?
items.hint: 直接使用 I suggest we... 開頭。
expect: I suggest we launch a new advertising campaign.
I suggest we start a new advertising campaign.
I suggest we launch a new ad campaign.
items.model_answer: I suggest we launch a new advertising campaign.
items.sample: I suggest we launch a new advertising campaign.
items.correct_reply: 很好，你已經能在會議中提出具體建議。
items.retry_reply: 請用 I suggest we 開頭，並提到 advertising campaign。

ja.prompt: 新しい広告キャンペーンを提案したいとき、何と言えますか？
ja.hint: 「I suggest we...」で始めてください。
ja.sample: I suggest we launch a new advertising campaign.

zh.prompt: 你想提出新的廣告活動，可以怎麼說？
zh.hint: 請用 I suggest we... 開頭。
zh.sample: I suggest we launch a new advertising campaign.
